name: KORE Group Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We offer IoT connectivity to the Internet (IoT Connectivity) and other IoT solutions to our customers. We are one of the largest global independent IoT enablers, delivering critical services to customers that allow them to deploy, manage, and scale their IoT application and use cases, globally.
